channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Wed, Jul 15 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM — July Queer Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: Suggested donation $10 (pay what you can) | Chill life drawing session celebrating queer bodies and creativity. Suggested donation $10, pay what you can.

item.title: Wed, Jul 29 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222, United States | Cost: $10 | A crash course for newer/casual artists on drawing from life, including a guided figure drawing session with a live clothed model. All-ages event, replacing the usual monthly nude figure drawing session this July.

item.title: Thu, Jul 30 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Wed, Aug 19 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM — Queer Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull St, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $10 suggested donation | Queer Life Drawing hosted by RVA Thriving Artists — periodic figure drawing session with live queer-identified models in the community cafe event space.

item.title: Wed, Aug 26 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Fursuit Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222, United States | Cost: $15 | Short-pose figure drawing session with 2-3 full-suited furry models. All-ages event, replacing the usual monthly nude figure drawing session this August.

item.title: Thu, Aug 27 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Wed, Sep 16 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM — Queer Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull St, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $10 suggested donation | Queer Life Drawing hosted by RVA Thriving Artists — periodic figure drawing session with live queer-identified models in the community cafe event space.

item.title: Thu, Sep 24 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Thu, Oct 29 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Thu, Nov 26 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.

item.title: Thu, Dec 31 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure Drawing Open Studio with live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+, no registration required.
